title: Guatemalan selected for prestigious Chevening Scholarship
body: "A distinguished Guatemalan professional is heading to the United Kingdom to pursue a fully funded master’s degree through the UK Government’s prestigious Chevening Scholarship program.   Congratulations to Pablo Sebastián Diez Pinto, who will pursue a Master of Laws (LLM) at the London School of Economics and Political Science.   He will pursue this one-year master’s degree at a prestigious British university, representing Guatemala with excellence and ambition.   Chevening is a transformative opportunity, funded by the UK’s Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) and partner organisations, to empower future leaders from around the world to study in the UK, build global networks, and gain the skills to drive positive change in their home countries.   Chevening Scholars return home after their studies to contribute to their communities and join a global network of over 55,000 alumni who are making an impact across sectors and borders.   Applications for Chevening Scholarships are open until 7 October 2025. Learn more and apply at the Chevening website. "
